sections.paragraph:
Original: סגן

Transliteration: sâgân

Phonetic: saw-gawn'

BDB Definition:

  1. ruler, prefect, governor, a subordinate ruler
    1. prefects (of Assyria and Babylon)
    2. petty rulers or officials

Origin: from an unused root meaning to superintend

TWOT entry: 1461

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
